svg.text: Selenium → Playwright · AI-Augmented Pipeline · Claude / Gemini

g.text: Engineer input
Single .java file OR .zip bundle of Selenium test module
Passed via CLI: swiftmigrate --input <path> --output ./out
Pre-processor
Unzip if needed · collect all .java source files
Read raw text · pass file list + contents to core engine

svg.text: ③ AI migration core — primary AI call

g.text: Step A — rule table injection
All 70+ deterministic mappings loaded into system prompt
Step B — AI migration call
Pass 1 · apply rules strictly for known patterns
Pass 2 · AI resolves unknown patterns best-effort
Unknown with no resolution → TODO comment in output
Step C — new test case generation
Code formatter + syntax validator
Prettier format · tsc --noEmit · fail fast if unparseable
Execution validator
npx playwright test · stdout + stderr + exit code captured
Migration report + artefacts
Playwright .spec.ts file (migrated + new test cases)
Reliability score: Pass 1st run · Pass after N heals · Failed
TODO list: unresolved patterns flagged for engineer
HTML summary: counts · heal log · exec results
Claude API (primary)
Gemini API (team alternative)
Pluggable — swap via config

svg.text: Reliability score derived from execution outcome only — not self-reported by AI
